titleStmt.title: SII 28.132: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 132. (A.R. No. 287 of 1913.) CHIDAMBARAM, CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

summary.p: Naṭarāja temple, First prākāra north wall.

Records an order (ōlai) issued and written down by Toṇḍaimāṉ and addressed to the several authorities concerned with the temple administration approving the arrangement made by mūlaparushaiyār regarding land allotted as maintenance (jīvaṉa-śēsham) of those (tiruttoṇḍar) tending the garden set up to supply flowers for the tiruppūmaṇḍapam of the temple as also coconuts to the temple-kitchen (tirumaḍaippaḷḷi), by Pālaiyappuram-uḍaiyār Siṅgaḷa-rāyar and authorising the inscribing of the record on the walls of Vikkiramachōḻaṉ-tirumāḷigai. The land concerned was in two plots amounting to 13(1/2) mā which was allowed to enjoy exemption from payment of kaḍamai, kuḍimai and tēvai and was authorised to provide for the residence (nattam) for those serving in the garden as hereto before as per the charter (sādanam) pertaining to that land. However in respect of that land a contribution of 6 kalam per vēli of land that had grown crops was to be remitted as vīra-bhōgam 100 kāśu per vēli as kōyiṟ-kuḍimai and maḍavariśi as was being paid by the maṭha-nandavanam had to be paid. The land concerned lay in Bramhavīradhī-kkuḍi alias Śrī-Patañjalidēvanallūr in Madhurāntakappēriḷamai-nāḍu which was a northern hamlet (vaḍa-piḍākai) of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī ḥ— toṇṭaimāṉ Olai teṉṉavaṉ brahmārāyarum jayatuṅkappallavaraiyarum kurukulattaraiyarum Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār koyil śrīmāheśvarakkaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷum śrīkāriyañ ceyvārkaḷum sāmutāyañ ceyvārkaḷum koyilnāyakañ ceyvārkaḷum tirumāḷikaikkūṟu ceyvārkaḷum paṇṭārap pottakamu
ṭaiyārkaḷum kaṇakkarum kaṇṭu viṭutantatāvatu koyilukkut tiruppūmaṇṭapattukku mutalākat tiruppaḷḷittāmam Aḷakkavum tirumaṭaippaḷḷip paṇṭārattukku mutalākat teṅkāy Uḷḷiṭṭaṉa Eṇṇavum pālaiyappuram Uṭaiyār ciṅkaḷarāyar ceyvitta tirunantavaṉattut tiruttoṇṭarkaḷukku jīvaṉaśeṣamākak koṇṭuviṭṭa perumpaṟṟapuliyūr va
ṭapiṭākai maturāntakap periḷamai nāṭṭu brahmatirakkuṭiyāṉa śrīpatañcalitevanallūr pāl śrīpañcavaṉmātevivatikku meṟku Irācarācaṉ vāykkālukku vaṭakku mutaṟ kaṇṇāṟṟu Iraṇṭāñ catirattu Uṇṇiṟaintāṉeṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam nālumāvum Iṅke Iraṇṭām kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāñ catirattup periya cey Eṉṟu peruṭaiya nilam Oṉpatu māvaraiyum
Āka nilam Araiyemummāvaraiyum Iṉṉilattukkuc cātaṉappaṭiyāl Uḷḷa nantaṅkaḷum muṉpu kaṭamaiyum kuṭimaiyun tevaiyum tavirntu pontapaṭiye taviravum tiruvaraṅku Eḻuntaruḷuvikkavum virapokattukkut tiṭṭiṉa payirukku veli Oṉṟukku Aṟukalamāka vanta nellum koyiṟkuṭimaikku veli Oṉṟukku nūṟāka vanta kācum Iṟukkavum maṭavarici
kkup puṟamaṭa nantavaṉam Iṟuttup pontapaṭiye Iṟukkavum Iṉṉilattukku Ippaṭi ceyvatākat tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭa mulaparuṣaiyar niyokam Eḻutiṉamaiyil Eḻāvatu nāḷ Irunūṟṟu Irupattu Aiñcu mutal vikkiramacoḻaṉ tirumāḷikaiyile kalveṭṭak kaṭavatākavum paṇṇuvateṉṟu toṇṭaimāṉār Eḻuttiṭṭa Evaṟ tiṭṭut tirumā
ḷikai mulataṉattuk kottatu ḥ—
Digital edition of SII 28.132 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
